title: Selling Beats Online with Crypto Payments: What It Actually Is and How It Works
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a musician or producer in Kenya, you know the struggle of selling beats online without access to PayPal or Stripe. These popular payment platforms often come with geographic restrictions, making it difficult for creators in countries like yours to get paid for their work. You've probably tried alternative solutions, only to be met with high fees, delayed payouts, or even worse, having your account shut down without notice. It's a nightmare that's kept many talented artists from sharing their beats with the world. But what if you could sell your beats online with crypto payments and take control of your finances?
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling beats online with crypto payments is a growing trend in the music industry. It allows artists to connect directly with fans and clients without the need for intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe. With the use of blockchain technology, creators can receive payments in cryptocurrency, which can then be converted to fiat currency at the point of sale. This means you can get paid instantly, without the hassle of delayed payouts or high fees. It's a game-changer for artists who want to monetize their music without sacrificing their creative freedom.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind selling beats online with crypto payments relies on a combination of blockchain and web3 wallets. When a client pays for a beat, the transaction is recorded on a public ledger, ensuring that the payment is secure and tamper-proof. The payment is then sent to a web3 wallet, where it can be converted to fiat currency at a later time. This process is handled by specialized platforms like NOWPayments, which provide a seamless and secure experience for both creators and clients. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can integrate this technology into your own website, without needing to worry about the technical details.

This technology is built for musicians, producers, and other artists who want to sell their beats online without the hassle of traditional payment platforms. It's perfect for those who value creative freedom and want to connect directly with their fans and clients. With selling beats online with crypto payments, you can take control of your finances and get paid instantly, without sacrificing your artistic vision. It's a powerful tool that can help you build a loyal following and earn a sustainable income from your music.
Don't let geographic restrictions hold you back from selling your beats online.
